title: Wire voucher_check into Dash as a capability
description: Import checkVoucher/issueVoucher directly from core-brain or copy functions. Register in Dash server.ts. Dash already has its own FileSystemLongTermMemory instance.

title: Fix Dash greeting — 'running locally' is misleading
description: LLM inference hits OpenRouter/Anthropic. Rewrite to be accurate about what's local (data) vs cloud (inference).

title: Fix Dash model label — model name tag missing in UI
description: Model name tag (e.g. claude-sonnet-4) missing next to agent name in UI. Was showing before, now gone. UI regression.

title: Harden airplaneMode into real privateMode
description: Currently just swaps provider to Ollama. Needs to actually block all outbound LLM API calls at the request layer. Fail loud if Ollama isn't available.

title: Audit git history for PII
description: Run git log -p scan on both core and dash-brain repos for personal data, credentials, env vars. Squash or filter-branch before anything goes public.

title: Add access audit logging
description: When any brain file is read via MCP or direct access, log it (who, what, when). Currently no trail of who accessed what.

title: Make .locked enforcement consistent
description: MCP server respects it, but Dash reads files directly and bypasses the lock check entirely. Centralize the guard.

title: Minimal HTTP server — random port + mDNS announce
description: Done: random available port on startup. Still needed: announce via mDNS so Dash (or any instance) can discover and render Core's system board.

title: Claude Code as orchestrated agent
description: Dash spawns claude --dangerously-skip-permissions as child process. Governance replaces permission prompt: voucher token, locked paths, append-only JSONL heartbeat. Dash terminates if agent goes silent or drifts.

title: [bottleneck] Long-running system task for auto-decision updates
description:
**Auto-escalated from insight engine**

**Category:** bottleneck
**Confidence:** high
**Discovered:** 2026-03-04T22:53:51.219Z

**Problem:** The long-running system task for auto-decision updates is causing a bottleneck, potentially dragging other checklist indexes further due to queued activity.

**Investigation steps:**
1. Read the current status of the system task (queued or running) by reading brain/tasks/active.json
2. Check the last modification time of brain/checklist_indexes/mcp.json to determine if it has been updated recently
3. Verify if other checklist indexes are pending (brain/checklist_indexes/*.pending.json) and due for processing
4. Compare the timestamps of brain/checklist_indexes/*.pending.json files to determine if they are indeed being dragged further by the long-running task

**Root cause hypothesis:** The long-running system task is causing a bottleneck due to centralizing.locked file enforcement across MCP and Dash, dragging other checklist indexes further and due multiple work alongside.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- The system task is not queued (it's either running or completed)
- The last modification time of mcp.json is recent (within the past hour)
- No pending checklist indexes are due for processing (all files have a due date in the past)
- The timestamps of pending checklist indexes show that they are not being dragged further by the long-running task

**Files to check:**
- `brain/tasks/active.json` — to determine current system task status
- `brain/checklist_indexes/mcp.json` — to check for recent updates
- `brain/checklist_indexes/*.pending.json` — to identify affected checklist indexes

_Insight ID: ins_1fcd43f7_
